name: Turkey and Rocket Salad with Macadamias
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the rocket thoroughly.
2. Arrange the leaves on four plates.
3. Heat macadamia nuts in an ungreased container in the oven until they smell appetizing. Set half aside.
4. Process the remaining macadamia nuts, garlic cloves, salt, pepper into a paste using a food processor.
5. Slowly add macadamia oil and white wine vinegar to the food processor while it runs.
6. Slice or shred enough turkey for four people and gently toss with the macadamia dressing.
7. Arrange the dressed turkey on the prepared plates.
8. Drizzle leftover dressing over the salad leaves.
9. Sprinkle reserved macadamia nuts, chopped chives over the top.
10. Serve (Makes 4 servings).
